bird.name: Red-tinged myzomela
bird.summary: The red-tinged myzomela (Myzomela rubrotincta) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It was formerly considered a subspecies of…

locations.name: 世界鸟类学家联合会
locations.summary: 世界鸟类学家联合会（英語：International Ornithologists' Union），原称国际鸟类学委员会（International Ornithological Committee），是国际鸟类学大会（Internati…

locations.name: 奧比群島
locations.summary: 奧比群島是印度尼西亞的群島，位於布魯島和斯蘭島以北，北面有德那第島，南面有安汶島，行政方面由北摩鹿加省南哈马黑拉县負責管轄，最大島嶼是奧比島。

relations.subject: Red-tinged myzomela
relations.evidence: It was formerly considered a subspecies of the dusky myzomela (Myzomela obscura), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. It is found in the Obi Islands of Indonesia
